expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Case focus is explicitly covered: context intake preserves banding requirements, style constraints, and rendering assumptions before scenario drafting
expectations.evidence: Result explicitly states the Phase 1 goal: "must capture and preserve banding requirements, style constraints, and rendering assumptions *before* any scenario drafting" and provides a context intake artifact with dedicated sections: "### 3.1 Banding requirements", "### 3.2 Style constraints", "### 3.3 Rendering assumptions" plus an explicit non-goal: "No scenario drafting or test-case enumeration in this phase."

expectations.text: [phase_contract][advisory] Output aligns with primary phase phase1
expectations.evidence: The output is labeled "Phase 1 (Context Intake)" and constrains itself to intake content: "The output should be a context/intake artifact (not test scenarios)" and reiterates: "No scenario drafting or test-case enumeration in this phase."
